ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Internal course code */,
  "cricos_code" TEXT /* CRICOS code for international students */,
  "duration_years" TEXT /* Duration of the course in years */,
  "intake_periods" TEXT /* Intake periods for the course (e.g., Mar/July) */,
  "fees_2020" TEXT /* Indicative fees for the course in 2020 (in AUD) */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campus where the course is offered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course offers */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty offering the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the campus */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the campus */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* List of facilities available at the campus */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum student capacity of the campus */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude of the campus */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude of the campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, pending, withdrawn) */,
  "intake_period" TEXT /* Intake period for the enrollment (e.g., Mar/July) */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the semester of enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_intake_period FOREIGN KEY ("intake_period") REFERENCES intake_periods ("intake_period"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_enrollment_status FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_status") REFERENCES enrollment_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact details of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the fee applies */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the fee */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fee */,
  "payment_plan" TEXT /* Available payment plans (e.g., upfront, installment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student making the payment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which the payment is made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice generated for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intake_periods" (
  "intake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intake period */,
  "intake_period" TEXT /* Name of the intake period (e.g., Mar/July) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intake period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intake period */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applications for the intake period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the enrollment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enrollment status */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps for the student based on the enrollment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the course category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES course_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_category_mapping_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
